description_long: This is a single-serving cup of Bohunka brand yogurt or dairy snack, featuring a tapered cylindrical shape with a foil lid. The lid and cup are decorated with vibrant images of strawberries and a picturesque countryside scene, suggesting a strawberry flavor. The main label text is in Czech, with the brand name 'Bohunka' prominently displayed in bold black letters, and additional product information and ingredients listed on the side. The cup is primarily white with colorful accents, and the foil lid is slightly crimped around the edge. The packaging appears to be made of plastic with a metallic foil seal on top, typical for dairy snack products. The overall design is clean and visually appealing, with clear branding and flavor cues.
description: A Bohunka strawberry-flavored dairy snack in a tapered plastic cup with a foil lid, decorated with strawberries and countryside imagery. The packaging is white with colorful graphics and clear branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Bohunka brand name, large strawberry graphic, and countryside illustration on the foil lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the strawberry image, partial brand name, and visible product information in Czech.
description_view_2: Rear side view with more detailed ingredient and nutritional text, and a partial countryside scene.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Bohunka logo, strawberry graphics, and a blue brand label near the rim.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular logo with the text 'BOHUSLAVICKA MLEKARNA 1901' is visible near the rim of the cup, on the upper side. The main brand name 'BOHUNKA' is also prominently displayed in large black letters on the front.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry flavor is indicated by large red strawberry graphics and the word 'jahodami' (Czech for 'with strawberries') on the label.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the side of the cup in Czech, including details such as weight (130g) and ingredients.
